body.notes: Update _local_preferred(), _cloud_preferred(), reason() to use is_user_turn, research_mode, cloud_funded, complexity. Local-first default. Cloud only when flags say so AND cloud_funded. D211.
body.title: inference_gateway: wire new InferenceContext flags into DAG routing
body.result: DAG edge conditions (_local_preferred/_cloud_preferred/_cloud_ok) already consume D211 InferenceContext fields. All call sites verified correct. boot_check.py bad import (igor.paths → .paths) fixed — was crashing Igor on boot.
